title: Golden Globes 2026 full ceremony rundown: When each category will be announced
text: Golden Globes 2026 Ceremony Information. Host & Timing: Comedian Nikki Glaser hosted the 83rd Golden Globe Awards, which began at 8 p.m. ET/5 p.m. PT and was scheduled to run approximately three hours. Ceremony Structure: The show was designed to kick off with the supporting film categories and conclude with the major awards. Per the schedule, the final two categories—Motion Picture Drama and Motion Picture Musical or Comedy—were slated to air at 8:03 p.m. PT. Categories Covered: The ceremony honored achievements across film and television, including acting awards, directing, screenplays, animated features, and non-English language films, plus a new podcast category. The event took place at the Beverly Hilton and aired on CBS and Paramount+. This was Glaser's second consecutive year hosting the Golden Globes, and she brought her signature comedic style to the proceedings, opening with jokes about Wicked and One Battle After Another.
